RF-015.description: Exibir barras para cada dia da semana (Dom–Sáb) com a contagem de check-ins daquele dia
RF-015.evidence: WeeklyChart renders 7 Bar components via frequency.map(), with DAY_LABELS = ["Dom", "Seg", "Ter", "Qua", "Qui", "Sex", "Sáb"] (index 0=Dom, 6=Sáb). File: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/weekly-chart.tsx

RF-016.description: O cálculo deve considerar todos os check-ins disponíveis no histórico carregado
RF-016.evidence: computeWeeklyFrequency() returns array[7] indexed by dayOfWeek from all provided check-ins. Tests: 'agrupa check-ins por dia da semana' (freq[1]=2 for two Monday check-ins) and 'retorna array de zeros para lista vazia' (all zeros for empty input) — both PASS. File: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/hooks/use-dashboard-metrics.test.ts lines 77-95

RF-017.description: O gráfico deve exibir tooltip com contagem ao hover
RF-017.evidence: Bar component renders <div title={`${DAY_LABELS[dayIndex]}: ${count} check-in${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`} /> — native HTML title attribute provides tooltip on hover. File: apps/frontend/src/features/dashboard/components/weekly-chart.tsx line 49

relevantTests: computeWeeklyFrequency > agrupa check-ins por dia da semana
computeWeeklyFrequency > retorna array de zeros para lista vazia

codeVerification.computeWeeklyFrequency: Confirmed: returns number[7] indexed by Date.getDay() (0=Dom, 6=Sáb)
codeVerification.WeeklyChart: Confirmed: maps frequency[7] to 7 Bar components with DAY_LABELS
codeVerification.tooltip: Confirmed: each bar <div> has title attribute with day label + count
